proposal_summary: Onboard USDT to the Aave Ethereum V3 Liquidity Pool as a non-collateral asset with defined supply and borrow caps.

disclosed_entities.name: GenericListingEngine
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: The proposal payload uses the GenericListingEngine (0xC51e6E38d406F98049622Ca54a6096a23826B426) to perform a new asset listing

claimed_actions.raw_action: Onboard USDT to the Ethereum v3 Liquidity Pool
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: USDT becomes a borrowable asset in the pool, but not a collateral asset, with a supply cap of 200M and a borrow cap of 185M.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence:
The risk parameters provided introduce USDT as a non-collateral asset.
... supply Cap: 200_000_000, borrowCap: 185_000_000
